issue.title: Valid delta-only task packet fixture
issue.body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: validation_tooling
intelligence_level: frontier
reason: "Fixture issue supports delta-only task packet checks."
durable_source_of_truth: "GitHub issue #1001"
objective: "Validate task packet narrowing."
allowed_paths:
  - scripts/asgk.py
  - docs/control/TASK_PACKET_FORMAT.md
expected_output:
  - compact task packet check JSON
plan:
  - compare packet to issue scope
checklist:
  - command passes
acceptance_sheet:
  - packet narrows issue scope
non_goals:
  - no compact governance default
stop_conditions:
  - packet expands scope
rollback_expectations:
  - revert PR
```

task_packet.intelligence_level_reason: Fixture covers compact governance scope comparison.
plan: Compare packet allowed paths to issue allowed paths.
